response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Shirogane Noel from context (Birthday 2025). 2. 00:00-04:26: Song 'Ours' identified from on-screen text. Confirmed as her original song. Lyrics retrieved. 3. 04:26-04:33: Transition scene identified. 4. 04:33-04:58: Second song 'Bouya no Yume yo' identified from on-screen text. Credited to 'hotaru' and 'Masayoshi Oishi'. Lyrics retrieved.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a birthday concert performance by Shirogane Noel, featuring her original song 'Ours' (Acoustic & Piano version) followed by a short transition into a second, shorter song, 'Bouya no Yume yo', which serves as the ending theme.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs her original song 'Ours' on a stage with a moon backdrop. The text indicates it's the 'Acoustic & Piano ver.'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
また一つ重なっていくんだ
目を閉じてみたんだ
今夜　私たちだけで眠ろう
誰にも言わないで
君が眠りにつくその少し前に
名前を呼んで
叶わない願いに胸は痛んで
俯いてしまうけど
誰もいない街へ誘いに行くから
今日はこのままさよならじゃないよ
手をとってくれたなら
秘密も眠りにつくような夜に
君を連れていくよ
それは例えば遠く離れてたって
手を繋いでいられるような
奇跡のような話をしよう
窓は開けといて
聞こえる？
愛しいことや失くせないものを
教えてくれたのは今日みたいな
夜を重ねて織り上げてきた
私たちに響く音
響く言葉
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Again, one by one they pile up
I tried closing my eyes
Tonight, let's sleep just the two of us
Don't tell anyone
Just a little before you fall asleep
Call my name
My heart aches with wishes that won't come true
I hang my head, but
Since I'll invite you to a town where no one is there
It's not a goodbye for today
If you take my hand
On a night where even secrets fall asleep
I will take you with me
Even if we are far apart, for example
It's a story of a miracle
Like being able to hold hands
Keep the window open
Can you hear it?
What teaches me about precious things and things I can't lose
Is the sound that resonates in us
Who have lived through nights like today
Resonating words

scenes.description: A brief transition/interlude after the first song concludes.
The ending theme 'Bouya no Yume yo' plays, with text crediting lyricist 'hotaru' and composer 'Masayoshi Oishi'. Shirogane Noel is shown in a small boat.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぼうやの夢よ
小さな人の子よ
森へ迷い込んだ
大きな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Bouya's dream
Little child
Lost in the forest
Big
